content.text: Cluster is healthy. Now let's watch the baseline job progress until completion.

input.command:
kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -w &
WPID=$!
sleep 5
kill $WPID 2>/dev/null
echo "---current logs tail---"
kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline --tail=40

description:

WPID=$!
sleep 5
kill $WPID 2>/dev/null
echo "---current logs tail---"

job.batch/spark-skew-baseline condition met
exit: 0

content.text: Baseline job completed. Let's look at its full output to capture the skew evidence.

input.command:
kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew
echo "=== full log ==="
kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline > /workspace/baseline.log 2>&1
grep -n -i "skew\|partition\|duration\|elapsed\|result\|took\|seconds\|time" /workspace/baseline.log | head -60

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-skew-baseline","namespace":"spark-skew"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-skew","strategy":"baseline"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","set -e\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\necho \"STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)\"\necho \"\" | base64 -d \u003e /tmp/skew_baseline.py\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\\n  /tmp/skew_baseline.py\necho \"spark_skew_baseline_complete\"\n"],"env":[{"name":"STRATEGY","value":"baseline"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-skew","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"512Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"256Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:43:18Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    controller-uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
    job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    strategy: baseline
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
  resourceVersion: "33212"
  uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        controller-uid: 984de9aa-6a77-4b93-b47c-0e3b14eda833
        job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: baseline
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-skew
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30

kind: Job
metadata:

content.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

input.command:
mkdir -p /workspace/skew_scripts
cat > /workspace/skew_scripts/skew_broadcast.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count, broadcast

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Broadcast").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(broadcast(products), "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=broadcast  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=broadcast_join  benefit=avoids_shuffle_on_small_table  note=no_skew_from_join_shuffle")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

cat > /workspace/skew_scripts/skew_aqe.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_splits_skewed_partitions  note=spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

BROADCAST_B64=$(base64 -w0 /workspace/skew_scripts/skew_broadcast.py)
AQE_B64=$(base64 -w0 /workspace/skew_scripts/skew_aqe.py)
echo "broadcast len: ${#BROADCAST_B64}"
echo "aqe len: ${#AQE_B64}"
echo "$BROADCAST_B64" > /workspace/skew_scripts/broadcast.b64
echo "$AQE_B64" > /workspace/skew_scripts/aqe.b64

broadcast len: 1856
aqe len: 1836

content.text: Now let's build the Job manifests, matching the structure of the baseline job.

input.command:
BROADCAST_B64=$(cat /workspace/skew_scripts/broadcast.b64)
cat > /workspace/skew-job-broadcast.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
        - name: spark-skew
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          command:
            - /bin/bash
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
              echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids shuffle skew)"
              echo "${BROADCAST_B64}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
              /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
                --master local[2] \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\
                --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \\
                /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
              echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
          env:
            - name: STRATEGY
              value: broadcast
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
      restartPolicy: Never
EOF
echo "written"; wc -l /workspace/skew-job-broadcast.yaml

content.content:
written
42 /workspace/skew-job-broadcast.yaml

input.command:
AQE_B64=$(cat /workspace/skew_scripts/aqe.b64)
cat > /workspace/skew-job-aqe.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
        - name: spark-skew
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          command:
            - /bin/bash
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
              echo "STRATEGY=aqe (adaptive query execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
              echo "${AQE_B64}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
              /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
                --master local[2] \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.skewedPartitionFactor=2 \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.skewedPartitionThresholdInBytes=1KB \\
                --conf spark.sql.adaptive.advisoryPartitionSizeInBytes=1KB \\
                /tmp/skew_aqe.py
              echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
          env:
            - name: STRATEGY
              value: aqe
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
      restartPolicy: Never
EOF
echo "written"; wc -l /workspace/skew-job-aqe.yaml

content.content:
written
45 /workspace/skew-job-aqe.yaml
